mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_answer WHERE exam_paper_id = #{examPaperId} ORDER BY question_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_answer (exam_paper_id, exam_id, paper_id, question_id, student_id, question_type, question_order, score, max_score, correct_answer, answer_status, mark_status) VALUES (#{examPaperId}, #{examId}, #{paperId}, #{questionId}, #{studentId}, #{questionType}, #{questionOrder}, #{score}, #{maxScore}, #{correctAnswer}, #{answerStatus}, #{markStatus})

INSERT INTO exam_answer (exam_paper_id, exam_id, paper_id, question_id, student_id, question_type, question_order, score, max_score, correct_answer, answer_status, mark_status) VALUES
(#{item.examPaperId}, #{item.examId}, #{item.paperId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.questionType}, #{item.questionOrder}, #{item.score}, #{item.maxScore}, #{item.correctAnswer}, #{item.answerStatus}, #{item.markStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_answer SET student_answer = #{studentAnswer}, answer_status = #{answerStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_answer WHERE exam_paper_id = #{examPaperId} AND question_type = 5 AND mark_status = 0

SELECT e.id as exam_id, e.exam_name, MAX(ea.exam_paper_id) as examPaperId, COALESCE(SUM(ea.score), 0) as total_score, COALESCE(SUM(ea.max_score), 0) as total_max, e.start_time FROM exam_answer ea JOIN exam e ON ea.exam_id = e.id WHERE ea.student_id = #{studentId} AND ea.mark_status = 1 GROUP BY ea.exam_id, e.id, e.exam_name, e.start_time ORDER BY e.start_time DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT ea.question_type as question_type, COUNT(*) as total_count, COALESCE(SUM(ea.is_correct), 0) as correct_count, COALESCE(SUM(ea.score), 0) as total_score, COALESCE(SUM(ea.max_score), 0) as total_max FROM exam_answer ea WHERE ea.student_id = #{studentId} AND ea.mark_status = 1 GROUP BY ea.question_type

SELECT ea.question_id, ea.question_type, COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ea.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS correct_count, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ea.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS accuracy FROM exam_answer ea WHERE ea.exam_id = #{examId} AND ea.answer_status >= 1 GROUP BY ea.question_id, ea.question_type ORDER BY ea.question_type, ea.question_id
